archetype: THE PERFORMANCE PRO & SWISS BRUTALIST (Tactical EW Console)

guidelines: Use 'Chivo' with 'font-black' and 'tracking-tighter' for macro headers. Exclusively UPPERCASE.
Use 'IBM Plex Sans' for general UI body text to maintain sharp legibility.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL data points, coordinates, packet hex previews, MAVLink message types, and timestamps.
Overlines and table headers must be 'JetBrains Mono', 'text-xs', UPPERCASE, with 'tracking-widest'.
Never use generic sans-serif for numerical data; ALWAYS use tabular numbers.

surfaces: GRID BORDERS (The 'Technical' Look): Expose the skeleton. Use 1px borders on right and bottom of grid items to create a command-center mesh structure.
FLAT, CARDLESS UI: Avoid rounded floating cards with drop shadows. Rely on 'border-collapse' style layouts. Elements should butt up against each other with sharp 1px borders.
NO GLASSMORPHISM: Tactical interfaces demand raw data clarity, no blurry refractions.
CRT/Scanline overlay: Subtle repeating linear gradient background pattern for a rugged, classified aesthetic.
micro_animations: Blinking cursor indicators for active data streams and terminal logs.
Hard cuts or fast transitions (0.1s ease) rather than slow smooth fades. Interactions should feel immediate and mechanical.
Typing effect for mission logs and console output.

general: Bento Grid Mode B (High Density): Tight gaps (gap-0 or gap-4 with visible borders), 12-column foundation.
Containers must use 1px solid borders with sharp corners (rounded-none).
spacing: Use tight padding inside data cells (p-2 or p-4), but generous spacing (p-8) around the macro layout containers to separate modules.

rules: RESTRICTED BANNER: Fixed at absolute top and bottom (h-6). Bright red background ('bg-[#FF3B30]'), black text, bold, uppercase, mono: '// RESTRICTED - INDIAN MINISTRY OF DEFENCE //'.
TABS: Use sharp edges, 'border-b' only. Active tab gets a 2px colored bottom border (Info Blue or Critical Red).
BUTTONS: Brutalist, 1px border, square edges. Hover inverts colors or adds scanline overlay.
FORMS/INPUTS: Dark background ('bg-black/50'), sharp 1px border, bright text. Focus states must have a high-contrast ring ('focus:ring-[#00F0FF]').
required_screens: Login Screen: JWT auth, RESTRICTED banner, center-aligned brutalist login box over a dark grid.
Command Center Dashboard: Live RF spectrum waterfall (simulated), tactical map, swarm indicator, active target list.
Signal Detection & Analysis: 7-stage CEMA pipeline visualization, live IQ/pcap upload, drone protocol identification.
MAVLink Broadcast Console: Packet crafter (system_id, component_id, type), WebSocket stream view, hex/binary preview.
Payload Library: Cyber-physical attack scripts list with severity and target compatibility.
Kill Chain Tracker: Detect -> Track -> Identify -> Decide -> Defeat pipeline per target.

rules: Use sharp, functional icons. Minimal decoration. Ensure stroke width is thin (1.5) for a technical feel.
Use Framer Motion sparingly for data updates.
Fast, mechanical animations. Avoid bouncy springs.
Ensure 'prefers-reduced-motion' is respected for all blinking/flashing elements.
Ensure 4.5:1 contrast for all UI elements.
Critical alerts MUST NOT rely solely on color (use icons or flashing borders).
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based, e.g., 'data-testid="deploy-payload-btn"').

libraries: recharts: For RF spectrum waterfall and signal waveform charts (use AreaCharts with #00F0FF glow).

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do NOT use a generic SaaS layout. Think mission-control terminal and electronic warfare command center.
Implement the RESTRICTED classification banner firmly pinned to the top and bottom of every screen. It must be fixed.
Ensure dark mode is locked. DO NOT build a light mode toggle.
All hex dumps, console logs, and MAVLink packet views must strictly use the 'font-mono' (JetBrains Mono) class with a terminal-like appearance.
Use grid lines extensively ('border-border', 'border-collapse') to separate data points, rather than padded floating cards.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not apply `transition: all` anywhere. Be specific (e.g., `transition-colors`, `transition-transform`).
Never center-align the main app container. Keep it full width and grid-based.
Use Lucide icons strictly for all iconography. No emojis.
Implement `sonner` for all system alerts/toasts with a dark, tactical, toast style.
Ensure `data-testid` is added to all buttons, links, and forms for E2E testing.
Never use pure `#000000` for large backgrounds unless it's a specific terminal block. Use the defined `background.base` tint.
